name: retrobolt-runtime-admin
description: Runtime-discovered Retrobolt DB Admin frontend with no compile-time model/resource knowledge.

scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node scripts/build/check-dist.mjs
scripts.test:frontend-contracts: node scripts/contracts/db-admin-contract.test.mjs && npm run test:smoke-contract && npm run test:backend-ssot-compliance && npm run test:e2e-contract && npm run test:page-object-contract && npm run test:e2e-payload-contract && npm run test:code-ssot && npm run test:e2e-coverage-contract && npm run test:relation-selector-ssot && npm run test:setup-wizard-contract
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run test:frontend-contracts
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:docker-smoke
